sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68332" key="molibosfiggh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐβοσφιγγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n68332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fastened</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound with lead</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.155</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
